subject: Re: flght times
body:
ground delay in brazil or here

----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net; gmax1@mindspring.com; JETCARE@aol.com; bill@bhjets.com; drjet@tmo.blackberry.net
Sent: Tuesday, December 12, 2006 10:16:19 PM
Subject: flght times



 

St. Thomas to Rio 6+25min (-7 kts headwind)

St. Thomas to Sao Paolo 6+26 same wind

St. Thomas to SBSV Salvador de Bahia, Brazil, 5+52 (-16 
headwind)

 

expect up to 2 hour ground delays due to air traffic control 
in Brazil.
